The '''Mandalorian blaster''' was a slightly more powerful version of the common [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] used in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Used extensively during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] was fairly common throughout the galaxy due to the wars having taken place on so many worlds. Many of the blasters were found on the market following the end of the wars. It was believed that [[Gorse Bendak|Bendak Starkiller's]] blaster was a modified version of the weapon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
